 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	// Phase A atom A5 — explicit per-agent budget regime (`BUDGET_REGIME` +
     2	// `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env vars).
     3	//
     4	// Constitutional anchor: FC2-N22 (HALT node, `MaxTxExhausted` variant).
     5	// The transaction loop in `run_swarm` terminates on either OMEGA accept
     6	// (FC1-E17) or budget exhaustion (FC2-N22 / `MaxTxExhausted`). The budget
     7	// regime declares HOW the run-level budget is partitioned across the N
     8	// δ instances (Agent_i, FC1-N7) so that PPUT comparisons across N values
     9	// answer a well-posed question.
    10	//
    11	// Codex / Gemini N-agents brainstorm 2026-04-25 § A.3 frames four regimes:
    12	//   - fixed transaction budget         (tx=200 for all N)
    13	//   - fixed proposal / N×tx budget     (each agent gets tx=base proposals)
    14	//   - fixed token budget               (cap on total LLM tokens)
    15	//   - fixed wall-clock budget          (cap on T_i)
    16	//
    17	// In our codebase the inner loop (`for tx in 0..max_transactions`) invokes
    18	// exactly ONE agent per `tx` (Boltzmann-routed). So "tx" already counts
    19	// proposals, and the brainstorm's "fixed transaction budget" maps to
    20	// `total_proposal` (loop bound = base, regardless of N — current
    21	// behavior). The brainstorm's "N × tx = constant" is orthogonal: we want
    22	// the loop bound to scale with N so each agent receives the same number
    23	// of proposals — that's `per_agent`.
    24	//
    25	// PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer § 3 condition 3 (2026-04-25) names this atom
    26	// as a re-calibration prerequisite: "current max_transactions=200 is
    27	// fixed-tx budget; PREREG § 5.5 implicitly assumes tx-budget but doesn't
    28	// specify; need explicit budget regime declaration for calibration to be
    29	// reproducible." A5 satisfies that by stamping the regime + base budget
    30	// on every emitted v2 row.
    31	//
    32	// Phase A scope: implement `total_proposal` + `per_agent` (the two
    33	// regimes that fall out of the existing tx loop). `token_total` /
    34	// `wall_clock` require new exit conditions (cost / clock thresholds) and
    35	// are declared startup-fatal `UnimplementedRegime` so a misconfigured
    36	// `BUDGET_REGIME=token_total` aborts before burning LLM budget. These
    37	// land in a later atom once the cost/clock exit machinery exists.
    38	
    39	use std::fmt;
    40	
    41	/// TRACE_MATRIX FC2-N22: env var selecting how the run-level transaction
    42	/// budget partitions across N δ agents. Default (unset/empty) =
    43	/// `total_proposal`, preserving Phase B baseline behavior bit-for-bit.
    44	pub const BUDGET_REGIME_ENV_VAR: &str = "BUDGET_REGIME";
    45	
    46	/// TRACE_MATRIX FC2-N22: env var setting the base transaction budget.
    47	/// The effective loop bound is `effective_max_tx(regime, base, N)`.
    48	/// Default 200 (Phase B baseline).
    49	pub const MAX_TRANSACTIONS_ENV_VAR: &str = "MAX_TRANSACTIONS";
    50	
    51	/// Default base budget when `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env is unset.
    52	/// Preserves the long-standing `let max_transactions = 200` baseline.
    53	pub const DEFAULT_MAX_TRANSACTIONS: u32 = 200;
    54	
    55	/// TRACE_MATRIX FC2-N22: budget regime variants. The first two are
    56	/// implemented in Phase A; the latter two are declared so a downstream
    57	/// run that wants them aborts at startup (UnimplementedRegime) instead
    58	/// of silently falling back and burning budget under the wrong regime.
    59	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
    60	pub enum BudgetRegime {
    61	    /// Loop bound = `base`, regardless of N. Each agent ends up with
    62	    /// roughly `base / N` proposals. **Phase B baseline + default.**
    63	    /// Brainstorm § A.3 "fixed transaction budget".
    64	    TotalProposal,
    65	    /// Loop bound = `base × N`. Each agent receives `base` proposals
    66	    /// regardless of swarm size. Brainstorm § A.3 "N × tx = constant"
    67	    /// reframed as "constant per-agent".
    68	    PerAgent,
    69	    /// Cap total LLM tokens (declared, not yet implemented). Requires a
    70	    /// new exit condition tied to `RunCostAccumulator` thresholds.
    71	    TokenTotal,
    72	    /// Cap wall-clock T_i (declared, not yet implemented). Requires a
    73	    /// new exit condition tied to `RunWallClock`.
    74	    WallClock,
    75	}
    76	
    77	impl BudgetRegime {
    78	    /// Stable string label stamped on jsonl rows. Stable across releases;
    79	    /// downstream PPUT analysis joins on this exact string.
    80	    pub fn label(&self) -> &'static str {
    81	        match self {
    82	            BudgetRegime::TotalProposal => "total_proposal",
    83	            BudgetRegime::PerAgent => "per_agent",
    84	            BudgetRegime::TokenTotal => "token_total",
    85	            BudgetRegime::WallClock => "wall_clock",
    86	        }
    87	    }
    88	}
    89	
    90	/// TRACE_MATRIX FC2-N22: startup-fatal failure modes for the regime
    91	/// resolver. Each variant aborts before the first LLM call so a
    92	/// misconfigured run cannot consume API budget.
    93	#[derive(Debug, PartialEq, Eq)]
    94	pub enum BudgetError {
    95	    /// `BUDGET_REGIME` value not in
    96	    /// {`total_proposal`, `per_agent`, `token_total`, `wall_clock`}.
    97	    UnknownRegime(String),
    98	    /// `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` not parseable as positive u32.
    99	    InvalidMaxTransactions(String),
   100	    /// Caller asked for a regime whose exit machinery is not yet wired
   101	    /// (`token_total` / `wall_clock`). Carries the requested variant so
   102	    /// the startup error names what is missing.
   103	    UnimplementedRegime(BudgetRegime),
   104	    /// Effective loop bound would overflow u32 (`base × N > u32::MAX`).
   105	    /// Realistically unreachable (would require base × N ≥ 2^32) but
   106	    /// expressed in the type so the callers cannot panic on overflow.
   107	    EffectiveBudgetOverflow { base: u32, n_agents: usize },
   108	}
   109	
   110	impl fmt::Display for BudgetError {
   111	    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> fmt::Result {
   112	        match self {
   113	            Self::UnknownRegime(s) => write!(
   114	                f,
   115	                "BUDGET_REGIME='{}' is not a known regime \
   116	                 (expected total_proposal | per_agent | token_total | wall_clock)",
   117	                s
   118	            ),
   119	            Self::InvalidMaxTransactions(s) => write!(
   120	                f,
   121	                "MAX_TRANSACTIONS='{}' is not a positive integer",
   122	                s
   123	            ),
   124	            Self::UnimplementedRegime(r) => write!(
   125	                f,
   126	                "BUDGET_REGIME='{}' declared but its exit machinery is not yet \
   127	                 implemented (Phase A scope = total_proposal + per_agent only). \
   128	                 Aborting startup to avoid silent fallback under a different regime.",
   129	                r.label()
   130	            ),
   131	            Self::EffectiveBudgetOverflow { base, n_agents } => write!(
   132	                f,
   133	                "effective_max_tx overflow: base={} × n_agents={} exceeds u32::MAX",
   134	                base, n_agents
   135	            ),
   136	        }
   137	    }
   138	}
   139	
   140	impl std::error::Error for BudgetError {}
   141	
   142	/// TRACE_MATRIX FC2-N22: pure parser for the `BUDGET_REGIME` env value.
   143	/// Empty (unset / blank-after-trim) → default `TotalProposal`. No env
   144	/// access — testable without process-global state.
   145	pub fn parse_budget_regime(env_str: &str) -> Result<BudgetRegime, BudgetError> {
   146	    let trimmed = env_str.trim();
   147	    if trimmed.is_empty() {
   148	        return Ok(BudgetRegime::TotalProposal);
   149	    }
   150	    match trimmed {
   151	        "total_proposal" => Ok(BudgetRegime::TotalProposal),
   152	        "per_agent" => Ok(BudgetRegime::PerAgent),
   153	        "token_total" => Ok(BudgetRegime::TokenTotal),
   154	        "wall_clock" => Ok(BudgetRegime::WallClock),
   155	        other => Err(BudgetError::UnknownRegime(other.to_string())),
   156	    }
   157	}
   158	
   159	/// TRACE_MATRIX FC2-N22: pure parser for the `MAX_TRANSACTIONS` env
   160	/// value. Empty (unset / blank-after-trim) → default
   161	/// `DEFAULT_MAX_TRANSACTIONS`. Pure (no env access).
   162	pub fn parse_max_transactions(env_str: &str) -> Result<u32, BudgetError> {
   163	    let trimmed = env_str.trim();
   164	    if trimmed.is_empty() {
   165	        return Ok(DEFAULT_MAX_TRANSACTIONS);
   166	    }
   167	    match trimmed.parse::<u32>() {
   168	        Ok(0) => Err(BudgetError::InvalidMaxTransactions(trimmed.to_string())),
   169	        Ok(v) => Ok(v),
   170	        Err(_) => Err(BudgetError::InvalidMaxTransactions(trimmed.to_string())),
   171	    }
   172	}
   173	
   174	/// TRACE_MATRIX FC2-N22: scale the base budget by the regime + swarm
   175	/// size. Pure. Returns the loop bound (`for tx in 0..effective_max_tx`).
   176	///
   177	/// - TotalProposal → base
   178	/// - PerAgent      → base × n_agents (overflow-checked)
   179	/// - TokenTotal / WallClock → UnimplementedRegime (Phase A scope)
   180	///
   181	/// `n_agents == 0` is rejected upstream (run_swarm precondition); we
   182	/// pass it through here to stay pure but the multiplication is safe
   183	/// (`base × 0 = 0`, which fails the `for tx in 0..0` loop fast).
   184	pub fn effective_max_tx(
   185	    regime: BudgetRegime,
   186	    base: u32,
   187	    n_agents: usize,
   188	) -> Result<u32, BudgetError> {
   189	    match regime {
   190	        BudgetRegime::TotalProposal => Ok(base),
   191	        BudgetRegime::PerAgent => {
   192	            let n = n_agents as u64;
   193	            let prod = (base as u64).saturating_mul(n);
   194	            if prod > u32::MAX as u64 {
   195	                return Err(BudgetError::EffectiveBudgetOverflow { base, n_agents });
   196	            }
   197	            Ok(prod as u32)
   198	        }
   199	        BudgetRegime::TokenTotal | BudgetRegime::WallClock => {
   200	            Err(BudgetError::UnimplementedRegime(regime))
   201	        }
   202	    }
   203	}
   204	
   205	/// TRACE_MATRIX FC2-N22: env-coupled resolver invoked once at run_swarm
   206	/// startup. Returns `(regime, base_max_tx, effective_max_tx)` so the
   207	/// caller can both run the loop AND stamp the regime + base on the
   208	/// emitted v2 row. Errors abort the run before the first LLM call.
   209	pub fn resolve_budget(n_agents: usize) -> Result<(BudgetRegime, u32, u32), BudgetError> {
   210	    let regime_raw = std::env::var(BUDGET_REGIME_ENV_VAR).unwrap_or_default();
   211	    let base_raw = std::env::var(MAX_TRANSACTIONS_ENV_VAR).unwrap_or_default();
   212	    let regime = parse_budget_regime(&regime_raw)?;
   213	    let base = parse_max_transactions(&base_raw)?;
   214	    let eff = effective_max_tx(regime, base, n_agents)?;
   215	    Ok((regime, base, eff))
   216	}
   217	
   218	#[cfg(test)]
   219	mod tests {
   220	    use super::*;

     3	constitution:
     4	  - "Art. V.1.1 amendment 2026-04-25: sudo applies *only* to constitution.md"

     7	  - "FC3-N3 constitution-as-ground-truth + FC3-S3 readonly subgraph"
     8	source_lessons:

    10	  - "C-070 (preregistration discipline): governance precedes commit"
    11	
    12	incident: |
    13	  2026-04-25 session: 用户 sudo-authorize 3 处 Art. V 修订:
    14	  V.1.1 (sudo 范围窄化), V.1.2 (ArchitectAI commit 权限), V.1.3 (JudgeAI →
    15	  Veto-AI 重命名 + 范围窄化). 同时新增 Art. V.3 修订日志子节. Commit
    16	  c061450.
    17	
    18	  执行后发现 R-018 constitution_amendment_sudo (rules/active/) **未触发** —
    19	  原因: judge.sh:54 skip-list pattern '*.md' 在 engine.py 评估之前
    20	  silently skipped constitution.md. 即 ArchitectAI 当时 silently
    21	  amended ground truth file without governance gate.
    22	
    23	  Root cause: harness rule 集冻结于 Phase 8 (2026-04-13), 没规则覆盖
    24	  constitution.md. 新加 R-018 (2026-04-25 commit 2e7f75a) + judge.sh
    25	  special-case constitution.md before skip-list 才修好.
    26	
    27	facts: |
    28	  Art. V.1.1 amendment 文字明确规定:
    29	    "人类 sudo 权限**仅且只**作用于 constitution.md 本身. Trust Root
    30	     清单中的其他载荷文件 (kernel.rs / oracle / accounting / 预注册等)
    31	     属于 ArchitectAI 的合法升级范围"
    32	
    33	  实际执行需要 3 段守护 (per Art. V.1.1 final paragraph):
    34	    (i)  Veto-AI 提案时校核违宪与否 (proposal-time)
    35	    (ii) Boot SHA-256 manifest 保证运行时一致 (run-time)
    36	    (iii) 人类 sudo 限定 constitution.md 范围 (commit-time, 仅这一类)
    37	
    38	  本次 incident 暴露: 没有 (i)+(iii) hook 保护，仅靠 Claude 自律. 不可
    39	  接受 — Art. V.1.3 amendment 明确 Veto-AI 必须 enforce.
    40	
    41	ruling: |
    42	  **本案宪法修订流程 frozen**:
    43	
    44	  Step 1 — 用户在 chat 显式 type 完整短语:
    45	    "I authorize this constitution amendment"
    46	    (verbatim, 不可省略, 不可改动 — R-018 grep 此短语作 sudo gate)
    47	
    48	  Step 2 — 修订必须包含 V.3 修订日志条目:
    49	    | 日期 | 触发者 | 章节 | 摘要 |
    50	    每修订强制添加, 无 V.3 entry → R-018 BLOCK
    51	
    52	  Step 3 — Commit 必须同时:
    53	    (a) 修订 constitution.md 本身
    54	    (b) 修订 V.3 表 (添加 entry)
    55	    (c) 重算 sha256sum constitution.md → 更新 genesis_payload.toml [trust_root]
    56	    (d) cargo test boot::tests::verify_trust_root_passes_on_intact_repo
    57	    (e) commit message 含 "FC-trace: <FC?-N?> [role: constitutional amendment]"
    58	
    59	  Step 4 — 修订后 dual audit (Codex + Gemini) 显式审"修订是否符合 Art. V":
    60	    重 round 持续到 PASS/PASS. CHALLENGE 可 documented + accepted by user.
    61	    VETO 必须 fix.
    62	
    63	precedent: |
    64	  - **R-018 BLOCK** is hard gate — 不可绕过. 即使 Claude 知道 user
    65	    意图, 没有 verbatim "I authorize this constitution amendment"
    66	    短语 → Edit 工具 reject (exit 2).
    67	
    68	  - **判例适用范围**: 仅 constitution.md. Trust Root 其它文件 (载荷
    69	    源码 / 预注册 / 案例 / 评分管线) 属 ArchitectAI commit 权限范围
    70	    (C-073), 不需要 Step 1 的 sudo 短语.
    71	
    72	  - **后续 incident 复盘 trigger**: 任何"我们修了 constitution 但没
    73	    走 4 step 流程" → 本案 reopen + R-018 严格化.
    74

--- cases/C-072_veto_ai_scope_narrowing.yaml
     1	id: C-072
     2	title: "Veto-AI 范围窄化 — 输出域 {PASS, VETO}, 不做主观评判"
     3	constitution:
     4	  - "Art. V.1.3 amendment 2026-04-25: JudgeAI → Veto-AI rename"
     5	  - "Art. V.1.3 (post-amendment): 白名单严格排除 — 主观质量 / 性能 / 可读性 等不属 Veto-AI 职责"
     6	  - "FC3-N5 / FC3-E17: Veto-AI veto edge to ArchitectAI"
     7	source_lessons:
     8	  - "C-010 Audit Standard: VETO > CHALLENGE > PASS"
     9	  - "C-035 Generator ≠ Evaluator (现在加: ≠ Quality Reviewer)"
    10	
    11	incident: |
    12	  本 session round-2 dual audit 出现关键不一致:
    13	  - Codex: VETO (caught self-inflicted regression — TRUST_ROOT_TAMPERED 被
    14	           silent absorb)
    15	  - Gemini: PASS (没看出此 defect)
    16	
    17	  Codex VETO 是基于"违宪"判定 — round-1 fix 引入新缺陷使 ground-truth
    18	  feedback 被 silent suppress, 违反 thesis claim 7 (white-box predicates
    19	  settle on ground truth). 这是合法的 Veto-AI 输出.
    20	
    21	  Gemini PASS 也是合法 — 它没观察到该违宪.
    22	
    23	  问题是: 之前 JudgeAI 命名容易让人理解为"全面质量评审", 包括 code style /
    24	  performance / readability. 那样 Veto-AI 会有大量 false-positive
    25	  (CHALLENGE 不该 VETO) 或 false-negative (该 VETO 的真违宪被淹没在主观
    26	  judgment 噪声中).
    27	
    28	facts: |
    29	  Art. V.1.3 amendment 文字 (post-2026-04-25) 明确:
    30	
    31	    Veto-AI 唯一的工作是:
    32	      "拿着宪法, 反复逐条校验 ArchitectAI 生成的新架构代码是否'违宪'."
    33	
    34	    它**不**做 (白名单严格排除):
    35	    - 主观质量评价 (代码可读性 / 工程口味)
    36	    - 性能或效率评判
    37	    - 测试覆盖率主观打分
    38	    - 任何与"违宪与否"**无关**的判定
    39	
    40	    它只做一件事:
    41	      "否决违宪提案."
    42	
    43	    输出域 = `{PASS, VETO}` — 不承担其他主观评价.
    44	
    45	ruling: |
    46	  **本案 Veto-AI 行为约束 frozen**:
    47	
    48	  当前 manual Veto-AI proxy = Codex + Gemini dual audit. 每次 audit 必须
    49	  按以下 rule:
    50	
    51	  Rule 1 — Output domain MUST be 2-class only:
    52	    PASS: 没违宪发现
    53	    VETO: 至少一处违宪 (cite which Article / FC element)
    54	
    55	    **NOT allowed**: CHALLENGE-as-third-class, "code quality concern", "style
    56	    suggestion", "performance recommendation". 这些属 ArchitectAI scope
    57	    (Art. V.1.2), 不属 Veto-AI scope.
    58	
    59	  Rule 2 — Memory feedback_dual_audit_conflict 仍生效:
    60	    Codex VETO + Gemini PASS = 保守裁决 = VETO (本 session round-2 用例).
    61	
    62	  Rule 3 — CHALLENGE 是 INFORMATIONAL 不是 BLOCKING:
    63	    Audit 输出 CHALLENGE 提示有改进空间但**不违宪** → ArchitectAI 可选择:
    64	    (a) 同 commit fix (推荐), (b) 后续 sprint 处理, (c) 显式接受不修.
    65	    本 session round-3 Gemini CHALLENGE (EXIT=0+empty PPUT_RESULT) 选了 (a).
    66	
    67	  Rule 4 — Veto-AI 不是 product reviewer:
    68	    用户产品体验 / API 设计 / 工程 ergonomics → 不在 Veto-AI 职责. 这些
    69	    需要单独 review pipeline 或人类 architect 决策.
    70	
    71	precedent: |
    72	  - **判定边界 test**: 当 audit 报告写 "I think this could be cleaner..."
    73	    或 "Performance might suffer because..." → 不是 VETO 信号. 不算入
    74	    feedback_dual_audit_conflict 的保守裁决计算.
    75	
    76	  - **判定边界 test 2**: 当 audit 报告 trace 到具体 Article (Art. I.1
    77	    bool signal / Art. V.1.1 sudo / FC3-S3 readonly / etc.) → 是合法
    78	    VETO 锚点.
    79	
    80	  - **future Veto-AI runtime** (FC3-N32, 📅 Phase 11+): 实装时必须
    81	    enforce 输出域 2-class. 设计阶段任何 multi-class output schema
    82	    (e.g., severity levels, confidence scores) 违反本案 ruling.
    83	
    84	  - **Cross-ref**: C-073 (ArchitectAI commit authority — 接受 CHALLENGE
    85	    或自行优化属 ArchitectAI 权限), C-071 (constitution amendment
    86	    process — 修 Art. V 本身需 sudo).

    33	    经 Veto-AI (V.1.3) 校核未发现违宪后, 由 ArchitectAI 直接落盘并
    34	    更新 manifest 对应字段. 此过程**不需要人类 sudo**.
    35	
    36	    理由: 宪法已经是 ground truth, ArchitectAI 的修改若未违宪则属于
    37	    宪法允许的演化空间; 强制 sudo 反而把人类拉回工程细节, 违反
    38	    V.1.1 "人类只立宪法"的 Meta 原则.
    39	
    40	ruling: |
    41	  **ArchitectAI commit 权限 frozen**:
    42	
    43	  Rule 1 — Scope:
    44	    ArchitectAI commit 权限覆盖 ALL files EXCEPT constitution.md.
    45	    包括但不限于:
    46	    - src/{kernel,wal,bus,boot,main}.rs + 子模块
    47	    - experiments/ 全部
    48	    - genesis_payload.toml 本身 (载荷条目增减 + hash 重算)
    49	    - rules/ + .claude/hooks/ (governance instrumentation)
    50	    - cases/*.yaml (案例沉淀)
    51	    - handover/ (alignment / preregistration / audits / etc.)
    52	    - tests/ (含 fc_alignment_conformance.rs)
    53	    - PREREG_*.md amendment (PREREG 不是宪法)
    54	
    55	  Rule 2 — Required workflow:
    56	    a. ArchitectAI 设计 fix
    57	    b. FC-trace 锚点 (per memory feedback_fc_first_problem_handling)
    58	    c. (理想) Veto-AI proposal-time gate — 当前 manual via dual audit
    59	    d. cargo test --workspace + smoke (按 feedback_smoke_before_batch)
    60	    e. commit message 含 "FC-trace: <FC?-N?>"
    61	    f. (大改动) 双外审 (Codex + Gemini) Phase 边界 dual audit
    62	    g. (Trust Root manifest 涉及) sha256sum 重算 + genesis update
    63	
    64	  Rule 3 — Distinction from sudo workflow (C-071):
    65	    constitution.md 改动: 必须 4-step sudo 流程
    66	    其它任何文件: ArchitectAI commit, no sudo
    67	
    68	  Rule 4 — Audit 反复仍未 PASS (3+ rounds):
    69	    可能 fix 不当 — escalate to human, 不要继续 round 4 round 5.
    70	    人类 review 后可以 (a) 撤回 fix, (b) 接受 CHALLENGE, (c)
    71	    sudo amendment 改 constitution 让原 fix 合规.
    72	
    73	precedent: |
    74	  - **本 session 19 commits 验证**: 全程 ArchitectAI commit, 仅 1 个
    75	    (c061450) 走 sudo. 流程 work.
    76	
    77	  - **Trust Root manifest 是 ArchitectAI scope** — 这是关键判定. 加新

--- cases/C-074_fc_first_problem_handling.yaml
     1	id: C-074
     2	title: "FC-first problem handling — 任何问题先 trace 到 FC1/FC2/FC3 再设计 fix"
     3	constitution:
     4	  - "FC1 (basic cycle line 326) + FC2 (init/halt/tick line 441) + FC3 (system topology line 670)"
     5	  - "CLAUDE.md Alignment Standard — '每个 src/ pub 符号必须映射到宪法 flowchart 元素'"
     6	  - "Art. V.1.3 amendment: Veto-AI 只判断违宪与否, FC anchor 是 audit 输入"
     7	source_lessons:
     8	  - "F-2026-04-25-04: B7 alignment retroactive fix (pub symbols 无 backlink)"
     9	  - "F-2026-04-25-08: round-3 audit lesson (fixes can introduce regressions; FC-first prevents symptom-fix)"
    10	
    11	incident: |
    12	  本 session 5 个明确"症状-fix"导致回归的 case:
    13	
    14	  1. B7 ship pub symbols 无 TRACE_MATRIX backlink (commit be42f43)
    15	     — 用户 critique → 0cc48bc 补
    16	     根因: ship 时没 trace 到 FC3-N34, fix 是"加 doc-comment" 而不是
    17	     "确认 FC anchor 后再 ship"
    18	
    19	  2. B7-extra "halt at tx 50" 无 FC 锚 → 用户"原子化对齐"critique
    20	     → 重 design 为 synthetic ∏p=0 + FC2-N22 MaxTxExhausted
    21	     根因: 设计阶段没 trace 到 FC1-E18 + FC2-N22, fix 是"找最简实现"
    22	     不是"先确定 FC mapping"
    23	
    24	  3. Round-1 Q7.b fix "任何非零 exit 发 synthetic UNSOLVED"
    25	     → round-2 Codex VETO (TRUST_ROOT_TAMPERED 被 silent absorb)
    26	     根因: fix 没 trace 到 thesis claim 7 (ground-truth feedback
    27	     不可被 silent suppress), fix 是"消除 sampling bias 症状"
    28	
    29	  4. Round-2 同类 problem_file_missing silent absorb (round-3 CHALLENGE)
    30	     根因: 同 (3) — 没 systematic 应用 ground-truth-feedback FC anchor
    31	
    32	  5. 576-run batch 用 deepseek-chat (alias) 而非 PREREG-pinned
    33	     deepseek-v4-flash (canonical) — 用户怒
    34	     根因: MODEL_SNAPSHOT 字段没 trace 到 FC1-N7 (δ/AI canonical
    35	     identity) — 把"能跑"当成"对的", 没追问"label 是否 canonical"
    36	
    37	  共同 pattern: 没 FC-trace 的 fix 倾向于"消除症状"而非"修复架构".
    38	
    39	facts: |
    40	  本 session 用户在 mid-session 直接提出 rule:
    41	    "出现问题你先对齐宪法和宪法中三个flowchart"
    42	
    43	  Memory feedback_fc_first_problem_handling.md 已永久化:
    44	    - Step 1: trace 问题到 FC1 / FC2 / FC3 元素
    45	    - Step 2: 判断 (a) 映射到具体 node/edge → fix derive from anchor
    46	              (b) orphan → cite cases/Cxxx 或 PREREG-§n.m 显式 justify
    47	              (c) 映射不到任何 FC → ESCALATE for sudo
    48	    - Step 3: commit message 含 `FC-trace: <FC?-N?> [role]` 或
    49	              `FC-trace: orphan / <ref>`
    50	    - Step 4: Phase 边界 7 red-line check 加第 8 条 (every commit 含 FC-trace)
    51	
    52	  R-016 fc_trace_in_commit hook 已实装 (commit 2e7f75a) — git commit
    53	  无 "FC-trace:" → judge.sh WARN.
    54	
    55	ruling: |
    56	  **本案 FC-first 流程 frozen**:
    57	
    58	  Rule 1 — Triggers (任一即触发):
    59	    - cargo test failure mid-atom
    60	    - dual audit VETO/CHALLENGE finding
    61	    - smoke 异常 / 假设强反
    62	    - cost / time / API drift 异常
    63	    - 未列入 failure-mode list 的新 failure mode
    64	
    65	  Rule 2 — STOP 在 patch 之前. 不允许"快速 fix":
    66	    在 trace 到 FC anchor 之前, 不写 code, 不 commit.
    67	
    68	  Rule 3 — Trace mechanism (优先级):
    69	    1. 问题"事关什么 invariant"? 找 invariant 对应 FC element
    70	    2. 问题"破坏了什么 edge"? 找 edge 对应 FC arrow
    71	    3. 问题"在哪个 subgraph 内"? 找 subgraph 对应 FCx-Sn
    72	
    73	  Rule 4 — Commit message 格式:
    74	    ```
    75	    <title>
    76	    FC-trace: <FC?-N?> [role: ...]  OR  FC-trace: orphan / <Cxxx | PREREG-§n.m>
    77	    <body>
    78	    ```
    79	
    80	  Rule 5 — Phase 边界 7 red-line 加第 8 条:
    81	    本 phase 每个 fix commit 都有 FC-trace.
    82	
    83	  Rule 6 — Escalation:
    84	    - Step 2 落入 (c) (无法 trace) → ESCALATE for sudo
    85	    - Audit 反复 (≥3 rounds) 还围绕同一 FC element → re-trace,
    86	      trace 本身错了, 需 redesign
    87	
    88	precedent: |
    89	  - **本案应用范围**: 所有 ArchitectAI commit. C-071 sudo 流程已隐含
    90	    FC-trace (因为 constitution amendment 自身就是 FC 元素改动).
    91	
    92	  - **FC-trace 不是 documentation overhead** — 是 architecture
    93	    discipline. 不能 trace 的 fix 通常是错的 fix.
    94	
    95	  - **Cross-ref**: C-073 (ArchitectAI commit 流程包含 FC-trace),
    96	    C-072 (Veto-AI 的"违宪与否"判定 input 就是 FC-trace),
    97	    memory feedback_fc_first_problem_handling.md.
--- cases/C-075_do_178c_tool_qualification.yaml
     1	id: C-075
     2	title: "DO-178C tool qualification — 任何产生 frozen 数据的工具自身必须进 Trust Root"
     3	constitution:
     4	  - "PREREG § 1.8 Trust Root composition"
     5	  - "Art. V.1.1 amendment: sudo 仅 constitution; ArchitectAI 管 Trust Root manifest"
     6	  - "FC3-S3 readonly subgraph"
     7	  - "FC1-N7 (δ/AI) + FC1-N11 (∏p ground-truth) — 测量工具的 ground-truth 锚定"
     8	source_lessons:
     9	  - "C-012 (oracle preflight): 工具运行前必须验证可用"
    10	  - "C-070 (preregistration discipline): pre-reg precedes claim"
    11	
    12	incident: |
    13	  本 session B7-extra round-1 dual audit 发现 7 处 silent absorption
    14	  defect (Codex B1+B2+B3 + Gemini Q2.b/Q2.e + Q7.b). 共同 root cause:
    15	
    16	  PREREG § 1.8 frozen 16 文件 Trust Root, 但**漏了 3 类生产工具**:
    17	  1. src/main.rs — verify_trust_root call site (Q2.b VETO)
    18	  2. Cargo.lock — 依赖锁文件 (Q2.e VETO)
    19	  3. Calibration scripts (run_p0_calibration.sh + compute_p0.py) —
    20	     生产 frozen 数据 (p_0) 的工具自身
    21	
    22	  Codex round-3 又抓到 (B1): "evaluator binary 不调 verify_trust_root —
    23	  只 src/main.rs 调, 但 batch 不跑 main.rs". 即生产 binary 的 boot
    24	  路径没 enforce Trust Root, 仅 src/main.rs (开发 binary) 走完整流程.
    25	
    26	  这是经典 DO-178C tool qualification 缺位 — 资格化的工具 (Lean
    27	  compiler ground-truth oracle) 进了 Trust Root, 但调用 / 运行 /
    28	  分析 这些工具的 wrapper (evaluator boot, runner.sh, compute_p0.py)
    29	  没有.
    30	
    31	  16-file → 20-file 扩展在 commit 15b87fb 落地. 然后 d0d474e 把
    32	  problem_file_missing 路径也 hardened.
    33	
    34	facts: |
    35	  DO-178C 视角的 5 项原则 vs 本项目对照:
    36	
    37	  1. **Requirements traceability**:
    38	     ✓ TRACE_MATRIX_v0/v1 (FC ↔ symbol mapping)
    39	     ✓ tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs (mechanical witness, A0b 此案前)
    40	
    41	  2. **Multiple-level review**:
    42	     ✓ Codex + Gemini dual audit (4 rounds 本 session 验证流程)
    43	
    44	  3. **Tool qualification** ← **本案焦点**:
    45	     ✓ Lean compiler (∏p ground truth) — 一直在
    46	     ✓ B7 拉伸到: cost_aggregator + wall_clock + post_hoc_verifier +
    47	       jsonl_schema + evaluator + llm_http (mid-term audit add)
    48	     ✓ B7-extra round-1 拉伸到: main.rs + Cargo.lock + runner.sh +
    49	       compute_p0.py (此案 ruling)
    50	
    51	  4. **Configuration management**:
    52	     ✓ git + Trust Root SHA-256 manifest
    53	     ⚠️ rules/active/*.yaml 自身**未在 Trust Root** — A0d (TRACE_MATRIX_v2)
    54	        预留扩展点
    55	
    56	  5. **Problem reporting**:
    57	     ✓ handover/architect-insights/ + handover/audits/
    58	
    59	ruling: |
    60	  **本案 tool qualification 范围 frozen**:
    61	
    62	  Rule 1 — Trust Root MUST 包含产生 frozen 数据的工具自身:
    63	    - 工具产生数据被未来 dual-audit 引用 → 工具进 Trust Root
    64	    - 工具产生 PREREG 冻结值 → 工具进 Trust Root
    65	    - 工具产生 calibration / baseline / threshold → 工具进 Trust Root
    66	
    67	  Rule 2 — Trust Root MUST 包含每个 production binary 的 boot
    68	            integrity check call site:
    69	    - evaluator binary 必须 startup 调 verify_trust_root (B7-extra
    70	      round-2 fix)
    71	    - 任何新 binary 同此规则
    72	
    73	  Rule 3 — 工具的 fail-fast 是必须的:
    74	    - set -euo pipefail 强制
    75	    - 子进程 exit code 必须 propagate
    76	    - 不允许 silent absorption (Codex round-2/3 lesson)
    77	
    78	  Rule 4 — Manifest 添加新工具的工作流 (per C-073 ArchitectAI scope):
    79	    a. 写或修改工具
    80	    b. sha256sum tool_path → 添加 genesis_payload.toml [trust_root]
    81	    c. 重算 cases/MANIFEST.sha256 (如果工具是 case yaml)
    82	    d. cargo test boot::tests::verify_trust_root_passes_on_intact_repo
    83	    e. commit with FC-trace
    84	
    85	  Rule 5 — 工具升级也要走 Trust Root 流程:
    86	    每次工具改动重算 sha256 + 更新 manifest. R-014 hook 提醒.
    87	
    88	precedent: |
    89	  - **当前 Trust Root 20 entries** (commit d0d474e+ 状态):
    90	    8 PREREG 基础 + 6 mid-term audit add + 1 B6 prompt_guard +
    91	    1 B7-extra rollback_sim + 4 round-1 audit-fix tool qualification.
    92	
    93	  - **下一步 (A0d TRACE_MATRIX_v2 计划)**:
    94	    - rules/active/*.yaml 应进 Trust Root (governance instrumentation
    95	      tampering prevention)
    96	    - .claude/hooks/judge.sh 应进 Trust Root (hook itself is governance)
    97	    - tests/fc_alignment_conformance.rs 进 Trust Root (witness battery
    98	      tampering = silent constitutional drift)
    99	    扩展后 manifest size 推估: 20 → 23-25.
   100	
   101	  - **判定边界 test**: 一个新建 script 是否进 Trust Root?
   102	    - 如果它产生数据被 dual audit / freeze / claim 引用 → 是
   103	    - 如果它仅是临时探索 / 本地 utility → 否, 但 commit message 必须
   104	      显式说"non-frozen utility, not in Trust Root"
   105	
   106	  - **Cross-ref**: C-073 (ArchitectAI 管 manifest), C-074 (FC-trace
   107	    每 commit), R-014 hook (Trust Root drift reminder).

# Gemini Phase A → B Exit Audit (PPUT-CCL arc)
**Round**: R10
**Date**: 2026-04-26
**Reference**: see `handover/audits/A8_AUDIT_HISTORY_2026-04-26.md` for full chronology including atom commit chain + per-round verdicts/fixes.
**Test baseline**: 265 PASS + 29 ignored + 0 failed (Rust); 16/16 PASS (Python proxy tests)
**Trust Root**: 35-entry manifest verifies clean
**Elapsed**: 49.9s
**Prompt size**: 310,433 chars

---

As an independent, skeptical adversarial reviewer, I have completed the Phase A → B Exit Audit for the PPUT-CCL arc. My findings are based on the provided self-contained packet, including the current-state snapshot, the chronological audit history, and the appended source files. The conservative merge rule (VETO > CHALLENGE > PASS) and the precedent for rigor have been applied.

---

### Q1 — Code correctness spot-checks

-   **(Q1.a) `run_id` minting and propagation**: **PASS**.
    -   `experiments/minif2f_v4/src/bin/evaluator.rs`: In `run_swarm`, `let run_id = minif2f_v4::run_id::mint_run_id(...)` is called once at the function entry. This `run_id` is then passed to every `fc_trace::emit_event` call within the function and, critically, to the terminal `make_pput` call. The same pattern holds for `run_oneshot`. This correctly implements the A8e fix F1, eliminating the millisecond-drift join key issue identified in round 1.
-   **(Q1.b) `llm_proxy.py` routing logic**: **PASS**.
    -   `src/drivers/llm_proxy.py`: The `detect_provider` function now checks `if "/" in model:` before checking `if "deepseek" in m`. This ensures a model ID like `deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B` is correctly routed to `siliconflow`. This addresses the substantive bug K2 from round 6.
    -   `scripts/test_llm_proxy.py`: The test suite includes `test_deepseek_slash_form_routes_to_siliconflow`, which explicitly pins this required behavior, preventing regression.
-   **(Q1.c) `llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs` fail-closed behavior**: **PASS**.
    -   `experiments/minif2f_v4/tests/llm_proxy_python_conformance.rs`: The test contains `let python_check = Command::new("python3").arg("--version").output();` followed by `assert!(python_check.is_ok(), "python3 not found on PATH; ...")`. This `assert!` will panic the test runner if `python3` is not found, correctly implementing the "fail closed" requirement from round-3 fix H6. The panic message is descriptive and points to the explicit opt-out `SKIP_LLM_PROXY_PYTHON_CONFORMANCE=1`.

### Q2 — PREREG amendment soundness

-   **(Q2.a) `p_0 = 0.10` substitution wording**: **PASS**.
    -   `handover/preregistration/PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer_2026-04-25.md`: § 2 and § 8 are now internally consistent. § 2 correctly identifies `p_0 = 0.10` as the "LEAST strict admissible ceiling" and explains that a smaller `p_0` is stricter. The statistical implications regarding Type-I inflation are correctly stated. This resolves the substantive logical contradictions found in rounds 1, 7, and 8 (fixes F6, M4, N1).
-   **(Q2.b) Re-calibration conditions framing**: **PASS**.
    -   `handover/preregistration/PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer_2026-04-25.md`: § 3 lists the conditions "for re-calibration". § 2 and § 8 clarify that these are pre-requisites and do not guarantee completion before any specific phase, stating that "Phase E proceeds with the operationally-permitted ceiling substitution" if the conditions are not met. This framing is sound and avoids the over-promise caught in round 7.
-   **(Q2.c) Amendment in Trust Root**: **PASS**.
    -   `genesis_payload.toml`: The manifest correctly lists `"handover/preregistration/PREREG_AMENDMENT_p0_defer_2026-04-25.md"`.
    -   § 2 of the packet confirms that `boot::tests::verify_trust_root_passes_on_intact_repo` passes, which I accept as evidence of a clean hash match.

### Q3 — Atomicity, FC-trace discipline, governance

-   **(Q3.a) Atomic commits and governance**: **PASS**.
    -   § 1 of the packet presents a clean, atomic commit chain for A0a through A7. The packet asserts that no commit touched `constitution.md` and that each carried an `FC-trace:` message, which I accept as true based on the provided snapshot. The `judge.sh` hook is in the Trust Root to enforce this.
-   **(Q3.b) Cases C-071..C-075**: **PASS**.

    59	ruling: |
    60	  **本案 tool qualification 范围 frozen**:
    61	
    62	  Rule 1 — Trust Root MUST 包含产生 frozen 数据的工具自身:
    63	    - 工具产生数据被未来 dual-audit 引用 → 工具进 Trust Root
    64	    - 工具产生 PREREG 冻结值 → 工具进 Trust Root
    65	    - 工具产生 calibration / baseline / threshold → 工具进 Trust Root
    66	
    67	  Rule 2 — Trust Root MUST 包含每个 production binary 的 boot
    68	            integrity check call site:
    69	    - evaluator binary 必须 startup 调 verify_trust_root (B7-extra
    70	      round-2 fix)
    71	    - 任何新 binary 同此规则
    72	
    73	  Rule 3 — 工具的 fail-fast 是必须的:
    74	    - set -euo pipefail 强制
    75	    - 子进程 exit code 必须 propagate
    76	    - 不允许 silent absorption (Codex round-2/3 lesson)
    77	
    78	  Rule 4 — Manifest 添加新工具的工作流 (per C-073 ArchitectAI scope):
    79	    a. 写或修改工具
    80	    b. sha256sum tool_path → 添加 genesis_payload.toml [trust_root]
    81	    c. 重算 cases/MANIFEST.sha256 (如果工具是 case yaml)
    82	    d. cargo test boot::tests::verify_trust_root_passes_on_intact_repo
    83	    e. commit with FC-trace
    84	
    85	  Rule 5 — 工具升级也要走 Trust Root 流程:
    86	    每次工具改动重算 sha256 + 更新 manifest. R-014 hook 提醒.

exec
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba scripts/smoke_siliconflow.sh | sed -n '1,80p'" in /home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
     2	# Phase A atom A7 — SiliconFlow integration smoke.
     3	#
     4	# Probes each of the 3 SiliconFlow keys (primary / secondary / tertiary)
     5	# with a minimal chat call against a cheap model. Reports per-key OK or
     6	# FAIL without printing key material. Exits non-zero if any key fails.
     7	#
     8	# Why direct SDK probes (not via the proxy round-robin): we want a
     9	# per-key verdict — the proxy's round-robin would obscure which specific
    10	# key failed if one is rate-limited / revoked. After A7 PASSes, the
    11	# evaluator's runtime path goes through llm_proxy.py.
    12	#
    13	# Cost: 3 calls × ~50 tokens each = ¥0.001 - ¥0.005 total. SiliconFlow
    14	# Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct free tier covers this; backstop is the user's
    15	# key budget. Aborts after the first key fails to bound spend.
    16	#
    17	# Usage:
    18	#   bash scripts/smoke_siliconflow.sh
    19	#
    20	# Reads keys from .env (auto-loaded) or current shell env.
    21	
    22	set -euo pipefail
    23	
    24	cd "$(dirname "$0")/.."
    25	ROOT="$(pwd)"
    26	
    27	# Source .env if present; do not echo any value.
    28	if [ -f .env ]; then
    29	    set -a
    30	    # shellcheck disable=SC1091
    31	    . .env
    32	    set +a
    33	fi
    34	
    35	# Sanity: at least the primary key must be set.
    36	: "${SILICONFLOW_API_KEY:?SILICONFLOW_API_KEY not set; configure .env first}"
    37	
    38	python3 "$ROOT/scripts/_smoke_siliconflow.py"

exec
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba scripts/_smoke_siliconflow.py | sed -n '1,130p'" in /home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2	"""Phase A atom A7 — per-key SiliconFlow probe.
     3	
     4	Invoked by `scripts/smoke_siliconflow.sh`. Reads the three keys from
     5	env (`SILICONFLOW_API_KEY` / `_SECONDARY` / `_TERTIARY`), issues one
     6	tiny chat-completion call per key, and reports OK/FAIL per key WITHOUT
     7	printing any key material. Exits non-zero if any configured key fails.
     8	
     9	Cost bound: 3 calls × ~50 tokens. Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct on SiliconFlow
    10	free tier is the cheapest stable option (V3L-27 N=30 collapse caveat
    11	applies only at high concurrency; one call per key is safe).
    12	"""
    13	import os
    14	import sys
    15	import time
    16	
    17	try:
    18	    from openai import OpenAI, APIStatusError, RateLimitError
    19	except ImportError:
    20	    print("[A7-smoke] FAIL: openai SDK not installed (pip install openai)")
    21	    sys.exit(2)
    22	
    23	KEY_ENVS = [
    24	    ("primary", "SILICONFLOW_API_KEY"),
    25	    ("secondary", "SILICONFLOW_API_KEY_SECONDARY"),
    26	    ("tertiary", "SILICONFLOW_API_KEY_TERTIARY"),
    27	]
    28	BASE_URL = "https://api.siliconflow.cn/v1"
    29	# Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct: smallest stable production model on SF free tier.
    30	# Avoids expensive reasoning models during probe.
    31	PROBE_MODEL = "Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct"
    32	PROBE_PROMPT = "Reply with the single word: ack"
    33	PROBE_MAX_TOKENS = 8
    34	
    35	
    36	def probe_one(label: str, env_name: str, key: str) -> tuple[bool, str]:
    37	    """Return (ok, summary). Never returns the key in `summary`."""
    38	    client = OpenAI(api_key=key, base_url=BASE_URL)
    39	    t0 = time.time()
    40	    try:
    41	        resp = client.chat.completions.create(
    42	            model=PROBE_MODEL,
    43	            messages=[{"role": "user", "content": PROBE_PROMPT}],
    44	            temperature=0.0,
    45	            max_tokens=PROBE_MAX_TOKENS,
    46	            stream=False,
    47	        )
    48	    except RateLimitError as e:
    49	        return False, f"RateLimitError ({type(e).__name__}): {str(e)[:120]}"
    50	    except APIStatusError as e:
    51	        return False, f"APIStatusError {getattr(e, 'status_code', '?')}: {str(e)[:120]}"
    52	    except Exception as e:
    53	        return False, f"Error {type(e).__name__}: {str(e)[:120]}"
    54	    dt_ms = int((time.time() - t0) * 1000)
    55	    msg = resp.choices[0].message
    56	    content = (msg.content or "").strip()
    57	    usage = resp.usage
    58	    pt = getattr(usage, "prompt_tokens", "?") if usage else "?"
    59	    ct = getattr(usage, "completion_tokens", "?") if usage else "?"
    60	    return True, (
    61	        f"{dt_ms}ms; tokens prompt={pt} completion={ct}; "
    62	        f"content[:32]={content[:32]!r}"
    63	    )
    64	
    65	
    66	def main() -> int:
    67	    print(
    68	        f"[A7-smoke] SiliconFlow probe — model={PROBE_MODEL} "
    69	        f"max_tokens={PROBE_MAX_TOKENS}"
    70	    )
    71	    any_failed = False
    72	    any_present = False
    73	    for label, env_name in KEY_ENVS:
    74	        key = os.environ.get(env_name, "").strip()
    75	        if not key:
    76	            print(f"  [{label:9s}] {env_name}: NOT SET — skipping")
    77	            continue
    78	        any_present = True
    79	        ok, summary = probe_one(label, env_name, key)
    80	        verdict = "OK  " if ok else "FAIL"
    81	        print(f"  [{label:9s}] {env_name}: {verdict} {summary}")
    82	        if not ok:
    83	            any_failed = True
    84	    if not any_present:
    85	        print("[A7-smoke] FAIL: no SiliconFlow keys configured")
    86	        return 2
    87	    if any_failed:
    88	        print("[A7-smoke] result: FAIL (one or more keys failed)")
    89	        return 1
    90	    print("[A7-smoke] result: PASS (all configured keys responded)")
    91	    return 0
    92	
    93	
    94	if __name__ == "__main__":
    95	    sys.exit(main())

exec

I’m also checking the A7 smoke’s fail-closed behavior under missing secondary/tertiary keys. The live 3-key smoke passed, but the script logic appears to skip missing keys despite the packet treating “3/3 keys” as the acceptance condition.
exec
/bin/bash -lc 'set -a; . ./.env; set +a; unset SILICONFLOW_API_KEY_SECONDARY SILICONFLOW_API_KEY_TERTIARY; python3 scripts/_smoke_siliconflow.py' in /home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4
 succeeded in 2570ms:
[A7-smoke] SiliconFlow probe — model=Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct max_tokens=8
  [primary  ] SILICONFLOW_API_KEY: OK   1432ms; tokens prompt=36 completion=1; content[:32]='ack'
  [secondary] SILICONFLOW_API_KEY_SECONDARY: NOT SET — skipping
  [tertiary ] SILICONFLOW_API_KEY_TERTIARY: NOT SET — skipping
[A7-smoke] result: PASS (all configured keys responded)

codex
**Findings**

1. **A7 smoke does not fail closed on missing secondary/tertiary keys.**  
   The packet’s acceptance evidence is explicitly “PASS (3/3 keys)” and “3 keys × 1 probe” ([A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/audits/A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md:49), [line 110](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/audits/A8_EXIT_PACKET_2026-04-26.md:110)). But `smoke_siliconflow.sh` only requires the primary key ([scripts/smoke_siliconflow.sh](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/scripts/smoke_siliconflow.sh:35)), and `_smoke_siliconflow.py` skips unset secondary/tertiary keys then returns PASS if any configured key succeeds ([scripts/_smoke_siliconflow.py](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/scripts/_smoke_siliconflow.py:73), [line 84](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/scripts/_smoke_siliconflow.py:84), [line 90](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/scripts/_smoke_siliconflow.py:90)). I verified primary-only mode returns PASS. This undermines the A7 3-key V3L-27 mitigation gate.

2. **A8 audit runner scripts are load-bearing gate tools but are not in Trust Root.**  
   C-075 says tools producing data used by future dual audit must enter Trust Root ([cases/C-075_do_178c_tool_qualification.yaml](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/cases/C-075_do_178c_tool_qualification.yaml:62)). The Codex/Gemini A8 runners assemble the packet, append sources, and write audit transcripts ([run_codex_phase_a8_exit_audit.sh](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/audits/run_codex_phase_a8_exit_audit.sh:52), [line 63](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/audits/run_codex_phase_a8_exit_audit.sh:63), [line 100](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/audits/run_codex_phase_a8_exit_audit.sh:100); [run_gemini_phase_a8_exit_audit.py](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/audits/run_gemini_phase_a8_exit_audit.py:77), [line 87](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/audits/run_gemini_phase_a8_exit_audit.py:87), [line 146](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/handover/audits/run_gemini_phase_a8_exit_audit.py:146)). The 35-entry Trust Root includes the history doc but not these two runner scripts ([genesis_payload.toml](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/genesis_payload.toml:68), [line 93](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/genesis_payload.toml:93)). Given R8/R9 runner defects, these scripts are demonstrably not incidental.

**Verified**

`cargo test --workspace`: 265 passed / 29 ignored / 0 failed.  
`python3 scripts/test_llm_proxy.py`: 16/16 PASS.  
`bash scripts/smoke_siliconflow.sh`: PASS with all three current keys.  
Runner O1 no-env and overwrite guards both fail fast before API calls.

**VERDICT**: CHALLENGE  
**Conviction**: high  
**Recommendation**: FIX-THEN-PROCEED
